case_title: JORIE CRAIG VS. TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL EVICTION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAIG, JORIE AS TO DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY TIPTON, RICHARD F INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY EVA, MATTHEW J EVA, WADE W LIOTTA, MONICA L DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-25-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-23-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-10-2009

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, MATTHEW EVA, WADE EVA, MONICA LIOTTA, AND, RICHARD TIPTON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED IN PART WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTEENTH AND SIXTEENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST, SEVENTH, ELEVENTH, TWELFTH, AND THIRTEENTH CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE FOURTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR "HABITABILITY TORT" WHICH IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION. UNCLEAR WHETHER CLAIM IS FOR GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, OR WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY. SUSTAINED AS TO THE SIXTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE NEGLIGENCE PER SE IS NOT AN INDEPENDENT CAUSE OF ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, MATTHEW EVA, WADE EVA, MONICA LIOTTA, and, RICHARD TIPTON Motion to Reclassify Case to Limited Jurisdiction. Appearances: Michael Bracamontes, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak, (415) 835-6777 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Steven W. Yuen, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (415) 788-1900, appearing for Defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Set For Trial On May-10-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-23-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613

Notice Of Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, MATTHEW EVA, WADE EVA, MONICA LIOTTA, and, RICHARD TIPTON Motion to Strike portions of the First, Seventh, Thirteenth, Fourteenth and Sixteenth causes of action of the Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied as non-compliant with CRC Rule 3.1113(a) and off calendar as moot based on ruling on demurrer. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, MATTHEW EVA, WADE EVA, MONICA LIOTTA, and, RICHARD TIPTON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained in part with ten days leave to amend as to the fourteenth and sixteenth causes of action. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled as to the first, seventh, eleventh, twelfth, and thirteenth causes of action. Demurrer is sustained as to the fourteenth cause of action for "habitability tort" which is not a cause of action. Unclear whether claim is for general negligence, intentional infliction of emotional distress, or warranty of habitability. Sustained as to the sixteenth cause of action because negligence per se is not an independent cause of action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
